goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should be in the 'moderate' price range and should serve 'catalan' food.
The restaurant should be in the 'centre'.
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves 'italian' food.
Make sure you get 'phone number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should 'leave after 15:30' and should go to 'bishops stortford'.
The train should leave on 'friday' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'travel time'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the moderate price range and should serve catalan food
The restaurant should be in the centre
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves italian food
Make sure you get phone number
You are also looking for a train. The train should leave after 15:30 and should go to bishops stortford
The train should leave on friday and should depart from cambridge
Make sure you get travel time
